mission.title: flux: Image Digest Reflection
mission.description: Image Digest Reflection. Requested by 13+ users.

steps.title: Check current flux deployment
steps.description:
Verify your flux version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux
helm list -n flux 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working flux installation.

steps.title: Review flux configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant flux configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux
kubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux
```
This is an umbrella issue to track work around image digest reflection:

steps.title: Apply the fix for Image Digest Reflection
steps.description:
Hope this get's done soon, as having to come up with sortable pre-release semvers in CI for dev and staging environments is a PITA. It'd be great if imagepolicy can do `x.y.z-dev -> x.y.z-dev:foo -> x.y.z-dev:bar`.

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux
kubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Image Digest Reflection" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Hope this get's done soon, as having to come up with sortable pre-release semvers in CI for dev and staging environments is a PITA. It'd be great if imagepolicy can do `x.y.z-dev -> x.y.z-dev:foo -> x.y.z-dev:bar`.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible.
